name: Deep Research Agent
description: Run multi-query Exa searches, deep-scrape top results with Firecrawl, and have Claude AI synthesize a comprehensive research report. Posts the final report to Slack.

source.originalName: Open deep research - AI-powered autonomous research workflow

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the research report

researchTopic.description: The research topic or question to investigate

depth.description: Research depth: 'quick' (3 queries), 'standard' (5 queries), or 'deep' (8 queries)

steps.name: Save query generation prompt to temp file
Run Exa search with primary query
Pick top URLs for deep scraping
Deep scrape top results with Firecrawl
Save synthesis prompt to temp file
